name: Iphone 17 Pro Max
description: Experience the pinnacle of mobile technology with the iPhone 17 Pro Max. Featuring an advanced titanium design, an ultra-fast next-gen chip, and a revolutionary camera system for professional-grade photography and cinematic video.

name: JBL Party Box 710
description: Transform any space into a concert hall. This powerful speaker delivers 800 watts of high-performance JBL Original Pro Sound, synchronized with a dynamic, customizable light show that pulses to the beat.

name: Google Pixel 10
description: The smartest Pixel yet. Google Pixel 10 features an advanced AI-driven Tensor processor, a stunning Actua display, and an industry-leading camera that captures breathtaking detail even in low light.

name: Asus Monitor
description: Enhance your productivity and gaming experience with this crisp Full HD Asus monitor. Designed with eye-care technology and an ultra-slim profile, it fits perfectly into any minimalist workspace.

name: Sony Headphone
description: Enjoy pure audio bliss with Sony's signature sound quality. These headphones offer comfortable all-day wear, deep bass, and clear highs, making them the perfect companion for your daily commute.

name: Huawei Tablet
description: A versatile tablet designed for both work and play. Features a vibrant display, long-lasting battery life, and a lightweight design that makes it easy to carry your entertainment anywhere.

name: Wireless Earbuds Pro
description: True wireless freedom meets premium sound. These Earbuds Pro feature active noise cancellation, a secure ergonomic fit, and a sleek charging case for extended listening sessions.

name: Foldable RC Drone
description: Capture the world from above with this portable 4K drone. Featuring a foldable design for easy travel, stable flight controllers, and intelligent GPS return-to-home functionality.

name: Galaxy Watch 6 Ultra
description: The ultimate wellness companion. The Galaxy Watch 6 Ultra offers advanced health tracking, including heart rate monitoring, sleep analysis, and high-precision GPS for outdoor adventurers.

name: Surface Laptop 5
description: Sophisticated design meets blazing performance. The Surface Laptop 5 features a stunning PixelSense touchscreen, high-speed multitasking capabilities, and an elegant Alcantara or metal finish.

name: Authentics L16 Audio
description: A masterpiece of acoustic engineering. This premium wireless speaker system features a retro aesthetic with modern technology, providing room-filling, studio-quality sound with deep clarity.

name: ROG Swift OLED
description: The ultimate gaming display. This ROG Swift monitor features an OLED panel for true blacks, incredible brightness, and an ultra-fast refresh rate for a competitive edge in every game.

name: Pixel 8 Pro Slate
description: Redefining the smartphone experience. The Pixel 8 Pro Slate features a professional-grade triple camera system, exclusive AI photo editing tools, and a polished, durable matte finish.

name: iphone 15 Pro Max
description: A luxury flagship designed for excellence. Featuring the first aerospace-grade titanium design, advanced telephoto zoom, and the powerful A17 Pro chip for unmatched mobile gaming and productivity.
